narrative:
Pike-Delta-York Local Sd (Fulton) school district has 5,308 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
